Step: Read and note the current driver-side temperature displayed on the Climate Control screen
Expected Result: The current temperature value is visible (e.g. 72°F)

Step: Tap the driver-side temperature "Up" arrow button to increase temperature by one step
Expected Result: The displayed driver-side temperature increases by one unit (e.g. 72°F -> 73°F)

Step: Verify the updated temperature is displayed correctly
Expected Result: The new temperature value is shown on the driver-side display

Step: Tap the driver-side temperature "Up" arrow button two more times
Expected Result: The temperature increases by two more units (e.g. 73°F -> 75°F)

Step: Verify the driver-side temperature reflects the total increase of three units from the original
Expected Result: The temperature shown is 3 units higher than the original reading

Step: Tap the driver-side temperature "Down" arrow button three times to return to the original temperature
Expected Result: The temperature decreases by three units back to the original value

Step: Verify the driver-side temperature has returned to its original value
Expected Result: The temperature display matches the value noted in step 1

Step: Tap the "A/C" button to toggle the air conditioning
Expected Result: The A/C indicator changes state (on to off or off to on); the button or indicator updates visually

Step: Verify the A/C status indicator reflects the new state
Expected Result: The A/C button or status icon clearly shows the toggled state
